title: salvia interrupta subsp. interrupta
intro: Salvia interrupta subsp. interrupta, also known as 'interrupted sage', is a subspecies of the Salvia interrupta plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Salvia interrupta subsp. interrupta include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cognitive function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
